message:
fix: migrate server-root remotes to database dir on store open (GH#2118)

Users commonly run `dolt remote add` in .beads/dolt/ (server root) instead
of .beads/dolt/<database>/ (where CLI push/pull runs). syncCLIRemotesToSQL
now checks the server root for remotes missing from the database directory
and propagates them to both CLI and SQL surfaces.

Also improves the "remote not found" hint to explain the directory mismatch
and recommend `bd dolt remote add` over raw `dolt remote add`.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
